name: helixgen
description: Single-plugin marketplace for helixgen — natural-language → Line 6 Helix Stadium preset generation

plugins.name: helixgen
plugins.description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions. Bundles the /tone skill and the helixgen MCP server (code bundled, loaded from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}). The MCP server launches via `uv`, which auto-provisions the `mcp` and `click` Python packages into an isolated env — requires `uv` on your PATH.
